justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent initially queried for a four-hour window (1 PM to 5 PM) for a two-hour session, which is a minor imprecision, and then in the second turn, it queried for a one-hour slot (1 PM to 2 PM) when the user explicitly asked for a two-hour session.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made an unnecessary API call in Turn 2 by checking for a one-hour slot when the user clearly stated a need for a two-hour session, and it also asked about contact medium in Turn 1 when the user had not specified it.
